full_text:
Ma Liang (Jichang) 馬良 (季常)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Ma Liang (馬良), styledJichang (季常), was born in Yicheng county, Xiangyang commandery. Administered Jing after Liu Bei took Shu. Nicknamed ‘White Eyebrows’. Ma Liang was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom. Ma Liang lived during the Later Han Dynasty and Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
